name: São Paulo
industries: Banking and fintech, continental-scale manufacturing and regional corporate headquarters anchor Latin America's largest market.
intro: São Paulo concentrates Latin America's project firepower: Faria Lima's banks and Nubank-led fintechs iterate at Silicon Valley pace, the industrial belt runs the continent's largest manufacturing programs, and global firms manage their South American portfolios from Paulista towers. Brazil's PMI chapters are among the world's largest, so PMP recognition is deep; the tech scene has made Scrum credentials equally mainstream. Live online training runs continuously through the year for São Paulo, with weekend Saturday–Sunday and weekday Wednesday–Thursday cohorts timed to sensible local hours; the schedule below shows the exact São Paulo start and finish for each upcoming batch. The package is constant: live weekend instruction in English, exam application support, calibrated mock exams, and trainer access until you certify. Brazilian learners train in English, which doubles as preparation for the multinational delivery roles most target.

faq.q: What are the class timings in São Paulo?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM CT, which is 11:00 AM – 08:00 PM BRT in São Paulo. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in São Paulo?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in São Paulo. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Brazil?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Brazil and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in São Paulo sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Brazil accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in São Paulo — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for São Paulo: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
